signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

No breaking announcements, confirmations, or resolutions on inflation or related policy (e.g., Bank of Korea rate held at 2.5% for 7th month as expected on Apr 10 amid oil shocks) have occurred right now to shift prediction markets [1][3]. March CP
